title: Token-level intent history makes learned action catalogues executable
decision: Adopt token-level history matching as the proposal-support interface, but do not attribute its prior-only gain to JEPA simulation.
plain_summary: A token-level support head roughly doubles length-nine success and cuts invalid actions by about two thirds relative to phrase pooling, while a history-masked control fails; JEPA reranking was disabled and remains the next test.
